title: Pink Floyd: The Wall
posterAlt: Pink Floyd: The Wall (1982) movie poster
tmdbOverview: A troubled rock star descends into madness in the midst of his physical and social isolation from everyone.
synopsis: Released in 1982, Pink Floyd: The Wall is a music and drama film from United Kingdom. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.0 on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
